assumption: Service level is normalized between zero and one
risk_if_wrong: Normalization can hide real service thresholds and uneven consequences
review_action: Show raw service metrics where available

risk_if_wrong: Real hazards may be spatially uneven correlated or more severe
review_action: Use local hazard data and scenario ranges

risk_if_wrong: Formal capacity may fail under compound shocks or institutional breakdown

assumption: Recovery is modeled as a rate
risk_if_wrong: Real recovery depends on logistics finance staffing access and governance
review_action: Add operational recovery model where needed

risk_if_wrong: Degradation may be nonlinear hidden or irreversible
review_action: Test nonlinear and irreversible degradation rules

assumption: Adaptation investment improves capacity after timing threshold
risk_if_wrong: Investment may underperform maladapt or shift risk
review_action: Test weak delayed and maladaptive investment cases

assumption: Threshold risk uses a critical service level
risk_if_wrong: Real thresholds may be contested uncertain or domain-specific
review_action: Define thresholds with domain evidence and stakeholder review

assumption: Transformation is represented with a simplified trigger
risk_if_wrong: Transformation is institutional political ethical and place-specific
review_action: Use participatory pathway design and governance review
